title: bosistoa pentacocca subsp. connaricarpa
intro: Bosistoa pentacocca subsp. connaricarpa, also known as Bosistoa pentacocca, is a plant species commonly found in the Pacific Islands. It is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The medicinal properties of Bosistoa pentacocca include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bosistoa pentacocca include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating fever, which can be achieved through various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
